metaTitle: Coin Flipper & Dice Roller — Free Online Random Decision Maker
metaDescription: Flip a coin or roll dice instantly on your phone. Make random decisions, play games, or settle disputes fairly. 100% free and works offline.

howto.description: Switch between Coin Flip and Dice Roller using the tabs at the top.
Tap the big button to instantly get a random result.
See your recent results and statistics below.

why: Coin flip with heads/tails statistics tracker
Dice roller supports D4, D6, D8, D10, D12, D20
Works completely offline — no internet needed
No sign-up, no limits, completely free forever

faq.q: Is the coin flip truly random?
faq.a: Yes. The coin flip uses the browser's cryptographically secure Math.random() function to ensure a fair 50/50 result every time.
D4, D6, D8, D10, D12, and D20 are all available. You can also roll multiple dice at once.

faq.q: Can I use this for board games?
faq.a: Absolutely. The dice roller supports all standard tabletop RPG and board game dice types.
Yes. Once the page is loaded, everything works completely offline.

faq.q: Is there a history of results?
faq.a: Yes. Your last 10 results are shown below the main button so you can track your luck.

proTips: Use the coin flip to settle quick disputes fairly — it's a true 50/50 chance.
For tabletop RPGs, use D20 for attack rolls and D6 for damage rolls.
Roll multiple D6 at once for board games like Monopoly or Catan.
troubleshooting: If the animation seems slow, try refreshing the page.
For multiple dice, the total of all dice is shown along with individual results.
